_comment: Demo staging configuration — see README for usage

moment_1_budget_enforcement.description: fetch_data(4200) + process_a(14300) = 18,500 tokens. Budget is 20,000. process_b needs 8,500 → would push to 27,000 → SKIPPED.
moment_1_budget_enforcement.expected: process_b shows orange 'Budget Exceeded' badge, rest complete normally

moment_2_retry_and_fallback.description: process_a is forced to fail. It retries 2x, then falls back to simple_processor.
moment_2_retry_and_fallback.expected: process_a shows amber 'Fallback' badge, 3 attempts (2 retries) in detail panel

moment_3_agents_tab.description: Click the Agents tab in TopNav to see all registered agents with specs.
moment_3_agents_tab.expected: Table with 6 agents showing permissions, token limits, call limits, fallback config
